title: Painting Manager - Polypaint
description: A full-stack workflow management platform developed for the Polyball Werkstatt at ETH Zürich. The application enables users to track the progress of painting projects and manage studio space allocation, while a dedicated admin section provides control over user groups and permissions.

title: Vall'doAido - Branding for a Local Business
description: For a few years I have been working on the branding for Vall'doAido, a wine seller and online store. This includes the design of websites, menus, flyers, and other marketing materials.

title: Skischool Event raffle - Web Application
description: A web application for managing raffles for skischool events and competitions built specifically for the [Skischool Mürren](https://skischule-muerren.ch).
